evidence.claim: The system logs all account state changes (lock/unlock).
evidence.fact: Every login attempt and each change to a transaction's status is recorded with a precise time marker for later auditing.
evidence.user_story_span: system to log all authentication attempts (success/failure) and account state changes (lock/unlock)
evidence.fact_span: Every login attempt and each change to a transaction's status is recorded with a precise time marker for later auditing.
